theorem injective_card_le (n m : ℕ) (f : Fin n → Fin m) (h_inj : Function.Injective f) : n ≤ m :=
  Fintype.card_le_of_injective f h_inj
after_snippet:
import Mathlib

theorem injective_card_le (n m : ℕ) (f : Fin n → Fin m) (h_inj : Function.Injective f) : n ≤ m := by
  have h : Fintype.card (Fin n) ≤ Fintype.card (Fin m) := Fintype.card_le_of_injective f h_inj
  simpa [Fintype.card_fin] using h

theorem card_powerset (n : ℕ) (s : Finset ℕ) (hs : s.card = n) : s.powerset.card = 2^n := by
  rw [← Finset.card_powerset s, hs]

theorem card_powerset (n : ℕ) (s : Finset ℕ) (hs : s.card = n) : s.powerset.card = 2^n := by
  rw [Finset.card_powerset]
  rw [hs]

theorem infinite_primes (n : ℕ) : n = 0 → ∃ p, p > n ∧ Nat.Prime p := by
  intro h
  exact Nat.exists_infinite_primes h
after_snippet:
import Mathlib

theorem infinite_primes (n : ℕ) : n = 0 → ∃ p, p > n ∧ Nat.Prime p := by
  intro h
  have : n = 0 := h
  have : n < n + 1 := by omega
  exact Nat.exists_infinite_primes (n + 1)
